summary: Iteration 40: Long Shift Notifications & Admin Dashboard Changes - All tests passed. Backend 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend all features verified. 7-day POS chart removed, Today's Revenue widget with Cash/Card breakdown working, notification bell with badge and dropdown in Heva Ops header working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: notifications.py: LONG_SHIFT_THRESHOLD_HOURS=10 constant defines nudge threshold
notifications.py Lines 60-114: check-long-shifts endpoint finds open attendance >10h, creates nudge, skips duplicates via ref_id check
notifications.py Lines 24-45: get_my_notifications filters by staff_id for non-admin users, excludes read notifications
notifications.py Lines 48-57: dismiss endpoint sets read=True and read_at timestamp
server.py Lines 128-168: _long_shift_checker background task runs every 30 minutes (1800s)
AdminDashboard.js: Removed weeklyTrend state and 7-day bar chart widget
AdminDashboard.js Lines 369-408: Daily Revenue widget with Cash/Card breakdown bars
HevaOpsLayout.js Lines 55-102: Notification bell with badge and dropdown, polls every 60s
seed_data_creation: Created test long shift records (12h old open attendance) for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 40 verified: (1) POST /api/notifications/check-long-shifts creates 'Still on shift?' nudge for attendance records >10h open, skips duplicates via ref_id. (2) GET /api/notifications/my returns staff's unread notifications filtered by staff_id. (3) PUT /api/notifications/{id}/dismiss marks notification as read. (4) Admin dashboard no longer has 7-day weekly chart - only Today's Revenue widget with Cash/Card breakdown. (5) Heva Ops header has notification bell with red badge showing unread count. (6) Clicking bell shows dropdown with notification list. (7) Background task in server.py runs every 30 minutes to auto-check long shifts.

check_long_shifts_creates_notification.evidence: POST /api/notifications/check-long-shifts creates nudge for >10h shifts with title 'Still on shift?'

check_long_shifts_skips_duplicates.evidence: Second call to check-long-shifts reports 'created 0 new notifications'

get_my_notifications_returns_staff_notif.evidence: GET /api/notifications/my returns staff's unread notifications filtered by staff_id

dismiss_notification_marks_as_read.evidence: PUT /api/notifications/{id}/dismiss sets read=True and read_at timestamp

dismissed_notification_not_in_list.evidence: Dismissed notifications don't appear in GET /api/notifications/my

dashboard_stats_works.evidence: GET /api/attendance/dashboard-stats returns total_staff, clocked_in_count, scheduled_shifts, total_hours_today

admin_dashboard_no_weekly_chart.evidence: data-testid='weekly-chart' and 'weekly-chart-mobile' not found on dashboard

admin_dashboard_revenue_widget.evidence: data-testid='daily-revenue-widget' exists with revenue-total, cash-bar, card-bar

admin_dashboard_pos_metrics.evidence: metric-total-orders, metric-avg-order, metric-tables, metric-completed all render

heva_ops_notification_bell.evidence: data-testid='notification-bell' exists in Heva Ops header

heva_ops_notification_dropdown.evidence: Clicking bell shows data-testid='notif-dropdown' with notification list

heva_ops_notification_badge.evidence: data-testid='notif-badge' shows red badge with unread count when notifications exist

admin_login_works.evidence: POST /api/auth/login with SKAdmin credentials returns access_token, role=admin

staff_login_works.evidence: POST /api/auth/login with user credentials returns access_token, role=user
